description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is predominantly brown with lighter tan and off-white patches, suggesting weathering and exposure to the elements. The rock has a roughly triangular profile with several flat and gently sloping faces, as well as some rounded edges and subtle indentations. The texture appears coarse and granular, with visible pitting and unevenness across its surface. There are no visible carvings, graffiti, or artificial modifications, and the rock seems solid and dense. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscaping element in an urban park or roadside setting.
description: A rugged, medium-sized brown rock with coarse, weathered surfaces and irregular, natural contours. It features tan and off-white patches and a solid, dense appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, slightly sloped face with a mix of brown and tan coloration and some visible pitting.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a more rounded side with lighter patches and a prominent, weathered texture.
description_view_2: Here, the rock's surface appears smoother and more uniform in color, with fewer visible indentations.
description_view_3: This side displays a gently sloping face with a mix of brown and tan hues and a subtle, angular edge.
